channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: All 12 On Board Killed As Plane Crashes In US State Of Missouri

media:content.media:description: 12 dead in Missouri plane crash

item.description: All 12 On Board Killed As Plane Crashes In US State Of Missouri
item.content:encoded: All 12 On Board Killed As Plane Crashes In US State Of Missouri

item.title: More Than 73,000 People Have Died Till Now Due To Israel's Attacks On Gaza

media:content.media:description: The number of deaths since the beginning of the war is now 73,001.

item.description: Nearly 1,000 people have been killed in Gaza since the start of the ceasefire, according to Gaza's health ministry. Five Israeli soldiers have been killed since the truce.
item.content:encoded: Nearly 1,000 people have been killed in Gaza since the start of the ceasefire, according to Gaza's health ministry. Five Israeli soldiers have been killed since the truce.

item.title: "No F*cking Judgement": Trump Fumes At Netanyahu As Israel Strikes Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Trump said he let netanyahu know about his displeasure.

item.description: Trump said the US-Iran peace deal that will potentially end the war and open the Strait of Hormuz was still on track despite an Iranian threat to retaliate.
item.content:encoded: Trump said the US-Iran peace deal that will potentially end the war and open the Strait of Hormuz was still on track despite an Iranian threat to retaliate.

item.title: Video: Helicopters Collide Mid-Air In Rio De Janeiro, 6 Crew Members Dead

media:content.media:description: Small aircraft crashes are common in Brazil, the world's fifth-largest country.

item.description: Images of the scene in local media showed a thick plume of black smoke rising from the car dealership, where several cars were on fire.
item.content:encoded: Images of the scene in local media showed a thick plume of black smoke rising from the car dealership, where several cars were on fire.

item.title: Iran Slams US After Israel Attacks Lebanon, Says "No Point" In Peace Talks

media:content.media:description: A US official said Friday that the deal on the table included Lebanon

item.description: The latest hurdle came hours after Israel said its military had carried out strikes targeting Iran-backed Hezbollah in Beirut's southern suburbs.
item.content:encoded: The latest hurdle came hours after Israel said its military had carried out strikes targeting Iran-backed Hezbollah in Beirut's southern suburbs.

item.title: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Trump Slams Israel Attack On Lebanon As Iran Sees 'No Point' Of US Talks

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.

item.title: "Should Not Have Happened": Trump Slams Israel For Bombing Beirut

media:content.media:description: Trump's remarks came hours after the Israeli military struck a building in Beirut's southern suburbs

item.description: "Should Not Have Happened": Trump Slams Israel For Bombing Beirut
item.content:encoded: "Should Not Have Happened": Trump Slams Israel For Bombing Beirut

item.title: Trump Hosts 'Freedom 250' Cage Fights On 80th Birthday Amid War, Inflation

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump hosts a card of seven mixed martial arts fights.

item.description: Trump is set to watch 14 mixed martial arts fighters from five countries try to kick, punch and grapple their way to a victory before an expected audience of 4,000 people.
item.content:encoded: Trump is set to watch 14 mixed martial arts fighters from five countries try to kick, punch and grapple their way to a victory before an expected audience of 4,000 people.

item.title: On Camera, 'Spider-Man Of Yemen' Falls Into Volcanic Crater, Dies

media:content.media:description: Antar had gained fame on social media platforms where he posted videos performing high-risk ascents

item.description: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar, 30, was climbing the steep walls of the Hardah Dam volcanic crater in the southern province of Dhale on Friday when he lost his grip and fell into the 120 metre (393 feet) crater
item.content:encoded: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar, 30, was climbing the steep walls of the Hardah Dam volcanic crater in the southern province of Dhale on Friday when he lost his grip and fell into the 120 metre (393 feet) crater

item.title: Sheikh Hasina Aide And Bangladesh Ex-Top Cop Arrested By Interpol In Dubai

media:content.media:description: Benazir Ahmed is accused of multiple crimes, including corruption.

item.description: The United States imposed sanctions against the official in 2021 for his alleged role in hundreds of disappearances and extrajudicial killings when he led the feared Rapid Action Battalion paramilitary force.
item.content:encoded: The United States imposed sanctions against the official in 2021 for his alleged role in hundreds of disappearances and extrajudicial killings when he led the feared Rapid Action Battalion paramilitary force.

item.title: How A Ukrainian Erotic Model Led Deep-Sea Nord Stream Sabotage Mission

media:content.media:description: The diver has denied involvement in the sabotage (AI-Generated Image)

item.description: A former model and technical diver from Ukraine has emerged as one of the most intriguing figures linked to the 2022 Nord Stream pipeline explosions.
item.content:encoded: A former model and technical diver from Ukraine has emerged as one of the most intriguing figures linked to the 2022 Nord Stream pipeline explosions.

item.title: Technology Adopter To Provider: PM Modi Pitches India As Innovation Partner

media:content.media:description: PM Modi highlighted entrepreneurs using AI to transform village life.

item.description: Addressing the inaugural session of Bharat Innovates 2026, PM Modi delivered a sweeping vision of India's transformation from a developing-world technology buyer into a confident global innovation hub.
item.content:encoded: Addressing the inaugural session of Bharat Innovates 2026, PM Modi delivered a sweeping vision of India's transformation from a developing-world technology buyer into a confident global innovation hub.

item.title: Video: UK Military Intercepts Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker In English Channel

media:content.media:description: The vessel will now be moved to an anchorage off the south coast of England and monitored.

item.description: Navy commandos boarded the ship under cover of darkness by fast-roping from a helicopter in the dark, according to footage released by the ministry.
item.content:encoded: Navy commandos boarded the ship under cover of darkness by fast-roping from a helicopter in the dark, according to footage released by the ministry.

item.title: Video: Israeli Air Force Strikes Hezbollah Headquarters In Beirut

media:content.media:description: The Israeli air force said the attack was carried out after Hezbollah launched attacks towards Israel.

item.description: The strike caused panic in the area, with people searching for survivors as smoke and dust rose from the building and its debris covered the street.
item.content:encoded: The strike caused panic in the area, with people searching for survivors as smoke and dust rose from the building and its debris covered the street.

item.title: Who Is Ahmad Vahidi? Iran Guards Commander Driving Tehran's War Negotiations

media:content.media:description: Ahmad Vahidi serves as a deputy commander in the IRGC

item.description: Ahmad Vahidi serves as a deputy commander in the IRGC, one of the most powerful military organisations in Iran.
item.content:encoded: Ahmad Vahidi serves as a deputy commander in the IRGC, one of the most powerful military organisations in Iran.

item.title: Hormuz Reopening, No New Sanctions On Iran: Inside US-Iran Draft Deal

media:content.media:description: The draft memorandum includes a range of topics.

item.description: The deal also entails that Iran immediately reopens the Strait of Hormuz to all commercial vessels, while the US lifts its naval blockade on Iranian ports.
item.content:encoded: The deal also entails that Iran immediately reopens the Strait of Hormuz to all commercial vessels, while the US lifts its naval blockade on Iranian ports.

item.title: Riots Bring Belfast To Standstill. How Race-Hate Tension Triggered Protests

media:content.media:description: The protest started after a knife attack in north Belfast on Monday night.

item.description: During the violence, shops were forced to close, events were cancelled, and public transport was badly affected.
item.content:encoded: During the violence, shops were forced to close, events were cancelled, and public transport was badly affected.

item.title: Deadly Philippine Quake Raised Seabed By Up To Two Metres

media:content.media:description: The 7.8-magnitude tremor in southern Mindanao island on Monday killed at least 61 people.

item.description: A powerful earthquake that killed at least 61 people in the Philippines this week raised the seabed by as much as two metres (6.6 feet), exposing coral and harming...
item.content:encoded: A powerful earthquake that killed at least 61 people in the Philippines this week raised the seabed by as much as two metres (6.6 feet), exposing coral and harming...

item.title: German Heiress Shot Dead At Family's Luxury Safari Estate In South Africa

media:content.media:description: Caroline von Rantzau, 26, was found dead inside her room on June 1

item.description: The heiress had reportedly recently purchased additional properties in the region and was managing wildlife-related operations at the lodge.
item.content:encoded: The heiress had reportedly recently purchased additional properties in the region and was managing wildlife-related operations at the lodge.

item.title: Inside 24-Hour Talks That Led White House To Act Against Anthropic's AI Model

media:content.media:description: Officials began worrying that the model's safety protections might not be strong enough

item.description: The move came after concerns were raised about Anthropic's newly released AI model, Fable, which the company had said was safe.
item.content:encoded: The move came after concerns were raised about Anthropic's newly released AI model, Fable, which the company had said was safe.
